title: Housekeeping Supervisor
description: Supervise housekeeping operations for floors 12-18. Manage a team of 14 attendants across day and evening shifts. Responsible for room inspection, cart inventory, supply ordering, and shift scheduling. Coordinate with front desk on early check-ins and priority cleans. Maintain compliance with hotel sanitation standards. Handled team restructuring in 2023 without a drop in guest satisfaction scores.

title: Owner and Lead Event Coordinator
description: Sole proprietor of a Las Vegas event planning business specializing in Quinceañeras, milestone birthdays, and family celebrations. Full-service coordination including venue selection, vendor contracting (photography, floral, catering, music, choreography), décor, timeline management, and day-of execution. All clients acquired through referrals. Website: momentosbychris.com | Instagram: @momentosbychris

title: Housekeeping Attendant
description: Room cleaning and turnover for a 400-room hotel. Maintained assigned section of 16 rooms per shift. Promoted to Supervisor in March 2012.
